summary: Frontend-only verification of the new 'Related routes' internal-linking SEO block. Tested all 5 language variants of CDG (EN/FR/RU/HY/ES), a non-Paris city (RU Nice), and 9 city pages that do NOT declare an explicit pageId prop (fallback resolvePageId path). All pages render the block with 6-8 same-language <a href> links, correct localized RELATED_TITLES h2, correct data-testid=related-route-<pageId>, correct hrefLang attribute. Language alternates block regression from iteration 74 still passes.

test_results.ru_cdg_related_block: PASS - /taksi-iz-aeroporta-cdg: 7 links, title 'Похожие маршруты', all URLs are Russian (/taksi-iz-aeroporta-orli, /taksi-iz-aeroporta-bove, /transfer-disneyland-parizh, /transfer-aeroport-parizh, /transfer-vokzal-parizh, /transfer-gar-de-lion, /taksi-iz-aeroporta-nitstsa), labels in Cyrillic, hrefLang=ru.
test_results.en_cdg_related_block: PASS - /cdg-airport-transfer: 7 links, title 'Related transfers', all English URLs, hrefLang=en.
test_results.fr_cdg_related_block: PASS - /transfert-aeroport-cdg: 7 links, title 'Autres transferts populaires', all French URLs, hrefLang=fr.
test_results.es_cdg_related_block: PASS - /es/traslado-aeropuerto-charles-de-gaulle: 7 links, title 'Otros traslados populares', 5 Spanish /es/... URLs + English fallback for gare-de-lyon and nice (Spanish variant not defined in registry — expected behaviour per spec). Labels in Spanish. hrefLang=es on every link.
test_results.hy_cdg_related_block: PASS - /cdg-odanavakayani-transfer: 7 links, title 'Նմանատիպ երթուղիներ', all Armenian URLs (/orli-odanavakayani-transfer, /bove-odanavakayani-transfer, /disneylend-pariz-transfer, /pariz-odanavakayani-transfer, /pariz-kayarani-transfer, /gar-de-lion-transfer, /nis-odanavakayani-transfer), hrefLang=hy.
test_results.ru_nice_non_paris_city: PASS - /taksi-iz-aeroporta-nitstsa: 7 Russian links to Cannes, Monaco, Milan, Rome, Barcelona, CDG, Paris-airport with Cyrillic labels. Confirms non-Paris city cross-linking works.
test_results.resolvePageId_fallback_pages: PASS - 9 city pages tested that do NOT pass an explicit pageId prop (Cannes, Monaco, Milan, Rome, Barcelona, Berlin, Munich, Alicante, Yerevan). All correctly resolve to the right pageId via resolvePageId(explicit=undefined, seoUrls) → CITY_ROUTES lookup by seoUrls.en. Each renders 6-7 links with English title 'Related transfers'. berlin, munich and yerevan return 6 (registry defines exactly 6 related IDs) which is >=6 per spec.
test_results.language_alternates_regression: PASS - 'Also available in:' block still rendered below the new Related routes block on every tested page with correct data-testid=lang-alt-{en|fr|ru|hy|es} links, current-language variant correctly filtered out. Section ordering matches the design (Related routes → Language alternates).

critical_code_review_comments: getRelatedRoutes falls back to English URL when the requested language isn't localized (e.g. Spanish CDG shows /gare-de-lyon-transfer and /nice-airport-transfer in English). This is by design per the JSDoc comment, but it slightly mixes languages inside the same block on Spanish pages. If pure-Spanish links are desired, either (a) declare Spanish URLs for gare-de-lyon/nice in CITY_ROUTES, or (b) skip entries lacking a same-language URL in getRelatedRoutes. Non-blocking.

Berlin, Munich and Yerevan registry entries define only 6 related IDs so the block shows 6 links even though the limit is 8. Spec says 4-8 which is fine. If 8 is desired for those cities, extend `related` arrays.
The Related routes <section> uses aria-label='Related transfer routes' in English only. Consider translating aria-label per language for full a11y i18n. Non-blocking.

The Related routes block is a client-rendered React section (like the rest of CityTransferPage). Googlebot renders JS so links will be discovered, but a static HTML pre-render would make discovery even more reliable for slower crawls. Non-blocking, matches iteration 74 note.

resolvePageId matches by exact seoUrls.en equality. Works today because every CITY_ROUTES entry has a unique English URL matching the page's seoUrls.en. If future refactors ever change the English slug (e.g. gare-est vs gare-austerlitz — currently the id 'gare-est' has en URL '/gare-austerlitz-transfer' which is a minor id-vs-url mismatch), the resolver will still work but the mismatched id name could confuse future contributors. Consider renaming id 'gare-est' → 'gare-austerlitz' for clarity.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Related-routes internal-linking block is live on all CityTransferPage routes. Verified in iteration 75 across 15 URLs (5 CDG languages + RU Nice + 9 fallback-resolver city pages). To spot-check: navigate to any city transfer URL and query 'section[aria-label="Related transfer routes"] [data-testid^="related-route-"]' — should be 6-8 links. Title is RELATED_TITLES[language]. hrefLang attribute matches current language. Language alternates ('Also available in:') block still renders below.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bug. The feature is a purely additive SEO enhancement and works exactly as specified across all 5 languages and both explicit-pageId and fallback (resolvePageId) code paths.
